page_content:
Prerequisite: EDMS779 or permission of the instructor.

Credit Only Granted for: EDMS769B or EDMS787.

Formerly: EDMS769B.

EDMS798 Special Problems in Education (1-6 Credits)

Master's, EDMS majors, or doctoral candidates who desire to pursue special research problems under the direction of their advisors may register for credit under this number.

Restriction: Must be in Measurement, Statistics and Evaluation (Master's) program; or must be in Measurement, Statistics and Evaluation (Doctoral) program.
